summary: Extra Innings subscriber AppleTV+ archive - Game Tile
description: GIVEN a user is an XtraInnings subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archive AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND the AppleTV+ pill does not display in the game tile
